title: 썸남이 먼저 고백하게 만드는 법
text: When I see him looking neat and tidy, and then suddenly he wears revealing clothes that day, at that moment, $950, really something [Music] I love you. Today is the perfect time for a guy I'm seeing to confess, but he hasn't. Speaking from my own experience, if you do these things, the words "let's date" might come out without me even realizing it, or speaking from a woman's perspective, if you do these things to a guy you're seeing, it's words or actions that make him confess. Actually, it's giving him room. You're probably good at that, but I can't do it. But actually, before I start the video, there are two things I want to talk about. There are people who meet with the intention of confessing from the start, and there are cases where feelings develop while just flirting. But for me, that is n't common. But, just like you said, there is a point where I think, "Ah, I have a bit of a crush on this person," and then there is a moment when my feelings just suddenly surge. I'll tell you these points. Let's go, let's get it! [Music] The biggest method is to shake his heart, right? If we assume you need to make him anxious, then it should disappear later. After being too nice to him, [Music] " What are we talking about?" I don't really like the "What are we in?" kind of thing. It's my type, so the size is getting a bit off... what kind of relationship are we in? I don't really like them. And is n't that just a way to provoke them because they're hesitant to confess? They should have just confessed from the start. So when they suddenly disappear, that's just how human hearts are. And don't post stories and say things like, "I'm so pissed off." Just when you're in the "getting to know each other" phase and see each other often, for example, when a situation inevitably prevents you from contacting or seeing them, that's when you go a bit crazy. For instance, the other person goes to a workshop, maybe to Jeju Island. You feel like they really like you, so you think, "Okay, I'll confess right away when they get back." But then, when things change, your feelings do n't grow stronger. You've been together for a few days, and then they suddenly disappear.

title: 썸남이 먼저 고백하게 만드는 법
text: . You feel like they really like you, so you think, "Okay, I'll confess right away when they get back." But then, when things change, your feelings do n't grow stronger. You've been together for a few days, and then they suddenly disappear. I felt like they were always sleeping with other women during the "getting to know each other" phase, so I thought, "I should leave this out. No, but that could happen, right?" No, because I liked them, because I liked them, I stayed with them. So we started dating. I didn't do anything. [Laughs] I do have an honest side. [Laughs] [Music] I do n't usually tell others when I'm having a hard time. But since they notice first and know my situation, when I'm really struggling and they become a source of support, I lean on them a little. I do n't like leaning on others, but they just become a source of strength when it's hard to get out. When someone treats you well, it leaves a lasting impression and feels great, right? I think that's all about timing. For instance, sending a message to Demine when you're having a hard time, or sending vitamins via KakaoTalk Gift. But they don't expect anything in return while doing that; that makes me feel so good. They're just waiting for you. It gives you the feeling that they'll be by your side anytime. You create that timing yourself. That thought comes to me when I'm really struggling and need someone to lean on. But the important thing is that you have to know exactly why this person is having a hard time. For example, if I'm working on a project and things are n't going well and I'm having a hard time, and they empathize with me and understand, then... something like, "If it goes well, I'll make you something delicious," and so on. But it didn't work out. [Laughs] They do listen to other people well, though. There's this too. " There's a cafe." It's really easy to win them over. This is so simple. Suddenly asking, "What do you want to eat today?" [Music] Food is reallyimportant, you know. It's going to be so good, right? So, it's been a long time. It went well, right? title: 썸남이 먼저 고백하게 만드는 법
text: at do you want to eat today?" [Music] Food is reallyimportant, you know. It's going to be so good, right? So, it's been a long time. It went well, right? I have purchased exactly about 80% of "Wrong Love." I also know that when they call me " Oppa" when we're together, they are genuinely happy and enjoying themselves. It's fine if they say it out loud or just show it, but I like it even more when I can feel that. Especially... Because when there is content just the two of us know about—like a movie nobody else watches—and we happen to enjoy it, and one of us says, "Oh, you saw that?" That’s nice, and when we click, we’re in that funny situation. It’s not easy to get that to work even between friends, so if that happens, you think, "Dating this person would be really fun and enjoyable." So, it means we have good back-and-forth banter to some extent. If there’s a situation where we’re trying to hold back laughter just by looking into each other’s eyes, and things like that happen... [Music] One day, they look really pretty. Maybe it’s because I haven’t seen them in a while, or their fashion or hair is just perfect that day. One day, they’re just sitting there quietly, and I get this feeling, "Wow, they’re really pretty," and I want to confess. That’s also a situation. There are certain situations, like when we’re drinking and there’s a moment when they look pretty. For me, since we’re in the "getting to know each other" stage, I’ve been seeing them looking neat and tidy, but that day, when they suddenly wear something revealing, I want to buy it right then. It’s not just that I want to confess; it’s that I really want to confess. My feelings grow stronger, and the probability of confessing increases. [Applause] [Laughs] We came to drink wine, and the revealing outfit was... There was a time when I wore something like a black off-shoulder top, and it looked so pretty that I ended up buying it. It wasn't so much that I hesitated because of the exposure, but rather that I already had feelings for him and was waiting for the right timing to confess, thinking that day was the perfect moment. Honestly, I'm in the "getting to know each other" phase, but when my ex-boyfriend contacts me, my feelings somehow grow stronger. I don't know why, but since we are n't actually in contact and he's just joking around, it’s not like we're at a level where I can be jealous of only him. I know that, too. But it's annoying. But it's annoying. [Laughs] What are you doing to a guy? Honestly, I think it's okay to contact anyone when you're in the "getting to know each other" phase. But the moment I see that right in front of my eyes, the urge to confess rises. [Laughs] But it's annoying when he forces it out. [Music] They say he handled the joke really well. I didn't understand it when he said things to make me feel good. So, I really like it when he hangs up on his own. But when he hangs up, [Music] [Laughs] [Music] is n't he setting a time limit by saying, "Shall we go on a short, pretty overnight trip somewhere?" He says that with a glance, telling me, "Confess before then. I'mscared." It makes me imagine that drunken stunt a bit. It’s about making things, and regarding Nari, even though we’re the cutest, there was one thing she had while drunk. So she asked me to take a "life-changing" haircut, and I just said, "Let's go." She said she wouldn't go if I didn't let her get drunk. She's so cute. At moments like that, my feelings grew so much. I’m saying this because it’s useful right now: I like you, and she likes me too. title: 썸남이 먼저 고백하게 만드는 법
text: ngs grew so much. I’m saying this because it’s useful right now: I like you, and she likes me too. We’re in a situation where we’re watching the timing. I tried playing Truth or Dare while drinking once, and it definitely felt good. It gave me more certainty that she likes me too. It’s different from what you say and what you feel. But this is all based on the premise that you aren't confessing by doing this action right now, but that there is already some level of interaction, so I’m cutting it short. [Music] Today, we talked about the moments when guys want to confess and how to make them confess. It feels kind of easy, I mean. It is easy, but I think the part before that is difficult, like the " flirting" phase. Oh, and I’ve noticed in the comments lately that some people are trying to match us while watching our videos. They say guys like this kind of thing, but that’s just our preference. We’re just saying we like us; we’re not saying you have to do it this way, so I really don't recommend trying to match. It’s more like, "Oh, maybe we should try this a little bit?" But I think there is one action you should do. What is it? Oppa, what about us? I think it's more important to subtly encourage a confession rather than saying "We're in love" directly. For example, you show a lot of affection when you're together, but then reply well when you're apart. You make the guy curious first. I think you have to make him anxious first like this to make him more likely to confess. You all need to subtly induce a confession. What skills do you have to use to do that? So, to subtly induce a confession... make me curious.
